name: openstates-proxy

scripts.test: node --check index.js && node --check scripts/download-transcripts.js && node --check scripts/build-transcript-jsonl.js && node --check scripts/build-knowledge-corpus.js && node --check scripts/import-knowledge-to-supabase.js
scripts.knowledge:refresh: npm run transcripts:build && npm run knowledge:build
scripts.smoke: npm test && echo "Run npm start, then open http://localhost:3000 or curl /health."

description: Minimal open-source AI dawah chatbot using Ollama and local RAG sources
